prompt: Low angle, heavy Dutch tilt capturing high-velocity movement: A tan-skinned Latina professional in her late 40s strides briskly down a geometric concrete staircase, captured mid-turn. She wears a sharp, structured royal blue (#2563eb) trench coat that flares out behind her, emphasizing speed and the 'rollout' of a new standard. In her hand, she tightly grips a bright blue (#3b82f6) folder, the 'template' ready for distribution. Her gaze is sharp, looking ahead toward a destination off-frame. The background is a blur of dark blue (#1e40af) railings and abstract architectural lines, creating a sense of urgency and transformation. Kinetic energy, freeze-frame action. Clean digital clarity with precise color accuracy, shot on Phase One IQ4, 80mm lens, f/8, crisp detail throughout, diffused studio light, commercial photography for Bloomberg Businessweek
